title: pholidia woollsiana var. dentata
intro: Pholidia woollsiana var. dentata, also known as the tooth-leaved pholidia, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the family Rutaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Pholidia woollsiana var. dentata include essential oil, extracts, and infusions, which can be used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy.
